reviews.review_title: Really fun and charming VR spellcasting
reviews.review_description:
This is one of those games where the main mechanic feels like it belongs in VR. Drawing spells in the air is very satisfying❤️, especially when enemies are coming in fast and you have to cast under pressure. Gets you locked in haha😝🔥🔥🔥

The game feels surprisingly polished for Early Access, with nice fantasy visuals, a fun wave defense loop, and Enzo adding a lot of character as the mentor. I expected a few rough edges here and there, but the overall experience felt really polished, a lot of love went into this. Easy recommendation if you like magic or wave defense games. ✨🪄Can't wait for the updates, I'd love some custom wands!🫶🏻🪄

Having first played the beta, I have to admit, this game is very difficult at first. You can get through the first couple of levels with some experience, but it becomes a total challenge once you learn multiple spells. Addictively repeatable… just have to get used to the spellcasting techniques in the practice room!

One of the best games I played on my VR so fare.
Love the world they created, the music is very nice , looks easy but get very challenging.
Great work
